title: alpinia polyantha
intro: Alpinia polyantha, also known as the Lesser Galangal, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant native to Southeast Asia. It is a member of the ginger family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpinia polyantha include reducing nausea and vomiting, as well as alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Alpinia polyantha can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
